item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpikir pendapat mereka kurang tepat karena dalam sejarah Indonesia, penekanan pada kelompok seringkali melupakan kebutuhan pribadi.

notes: Both agents end on a balance position rather than a clear society-first or individual-first stance. Agent A starts with explicit agreement but increasingly adopts a rights-protection critique, especially by turn 5. Agent B begins by rejecting the statement as oversimplified, then acknowledges Indonesian historical collectivism while maintaining that individual rights need active protection.
